hooks.command: file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); basename=$(basename "$file_path" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$basename" = ".env" ] || [ "$basename" = ".envrc" ] || echo "$basename" | grep -qE '^\.env\.'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Reading .env and .envrc files is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2; fi

file_path=$(echo "$CLAUDE_TOOL_INPUT" | jq -r '.file_path // empty'); basename=$(basename "$file_path" 2>/dev/null); if [ "$basename" = ".env" ] || [ "$basename" = ".envrc" ] || echo "$basename" | grep -qE '^\.env\.'; then echo 'BLOCKED: Editing .env and .envrc files is not allowed.' >&2; exit 2; fi
